creator: hakan@siktas.com
text:
Created attachment 197808
Build error with portmaster

Hello,

I tried to update x11-toolkits/pango to the latest version and it fails to build with the attached error message. In my /etc/make.conf I have this

DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= perl5=5.26 php=7.2 pqsql=10 python=3.7 python3=3.7

and I would suspect that using Python 3.7 is related to this issue.

Greetings,
Hakan Siktas
